rationale: Current title is Content Writer at the fictional company Dunder Mifflin, career history consists entirely of non-technical roles (marketing manager, accountant, customer support), and skills are Redux/Scrum/Marketing with zero IR, ML, or engineering depth.

Entire career is DevOps at Cognizant (IT-services firm) with no product-company exposure; self-described AI/ML interest is limited to online courses and a small RAG side project, with no production embedding or ranking system experience.

Profile is a Civil Engineer whose actual roles are Graphic Designer and Marketing Manager at non-tech companies, with no ML or IR engineering work; top skills are Computer Vision and Photoshop, and the only AI mention is casual ChatGPT experimentation.

Accountant with full career at Wipro and Infosys in non-technical roles, self-described as a marketing manager pivoting to AI via ChatGPT experimentation, with no engineering, ML, or IR experience whatsoever.

Customer Support and Operations Manager roles at fictional companies Wayne Enterprises and Pied Piper with a career entirely in non-technical functions; skills are Databricks/Snowflake/HTML with no evidence of any ML engineering or IR work.

All four career roles are non-engineering (Customer Support, Content Writer, Sales Executive) at fictional companies Pied Piper, Initech, Dunder Mifflin, and Stark Industries, with no production ML or search engineering despite backend-sounding skills listed.

Advanced hands-on skills in OpenSearch and Milvus (vector DB) with strong endorsements, LoRA fine-tuning experience, and production ML work at HealthTech product companies (Wysa, PharmEasy), though significant time at Wipro and primary focus on forecasting/recommendation rather than direct ranking/IR systems.

Owns ranking layer at Razorpay (evolved BM25 to learning-to-rank), shipped semantic search with sentence-transformers and FAISS at Flipkart, expert-level Milvus/Elasticsearch/Vector Search skills with 5+ years endorsements, and explicitly owns an RAG eval framework — directly matching every core JD requirement.

Entire career is .NET and mobile development at HCL and Mindtree (IT-services firms) with only 3.9 years experience; RAG and Feature Engineering skills listed with strong endorsements appear inflated relative to a backend-only work history and no production IR or ranking system evidence.

Civil Engineer with sole employer being Wipro in a brand design/creative role, skills are beginner Spark/CSS/Angular/Tailwind, and the summary self-identifies as a marketing manager with only ChatGPT experimentation — no technical or ML engineering background.
